description:
! ! Warning ! !
Not only points, but ko threats are important here too.
sgf:
(;AB[jr]AB[jq]AB[kp]AB[ko]AW[ir]AW[jp]AW[ip]AW[iq]AW[jo]AB[mo]AB[no]AB[oo]AB[pp]AB[qq]AB[qr]AW[po]AW[pn]AW[on]AW[nn]AW[mn]AW[ln]AW[kn]AW[jn]AB[mp]AB[pq]AB[qo]AB[rp]AB[rn]AW[rm]AW[qm]AW[qn]AB[ro]AW[rk]AW[gr]C[Black to play - what will you do in an endgame? Points are the priority, but ko threats are also important. Sente is worth 0,5 pts (the ko)]AP[goproblems]
